description: Intent-level agent capabilities — what an agent can do with Push Chain. For the complete SDK method surface with signatures see sdk-capabilities.json. Utilities (parseUnits, formatUnits, encodeTxData, chain/token discovery, constants) and raw ethers.js operations are API primitives consumed inside these capabilities rather than standalone agent intents.

prerequisite_glossary.universal_signer_created: A UniversalSigner was created via PushChain.utils.signer.toUniversal() or toUniversalFromKeypair()
prerequisite_glossary.network_selected: A valid PUSH_NETWORK constant has been chosen (e.g. PushChain.CONSTANTS.PUSH_NETWORK.TESTNET_DONUT)
prerequisite_glossary.push_chain_client_initialized: PushChainClient instance is non-null — created via PushChain.initialize() (backend) or available from usePushChainClient() (React)
prerequisite_glossary.signer_library_available: An EVM signer library (ethers.js or viem) or Solana web3.js is installed and a wallet/keypair is available
prerequisite_glossary.keypair_available: A Solana Keypair (or equivalent non-EVM keypair) is in scope
prerequisite_glossary.chain_and_library_specified: Both CHAIN and LIBRARY constants are known — see agents/constants.json or PushChain.CONSTANTS
prerequisite_glossary.rpc_url_available: The Push Chain EVM RPC endpoint is known: https://evm.donut.rpc.push.org/
prerequisite_glossary.evm_client_initialized: An ethers.JsonRpcProvider or viem PublicClient connected to Push Chain is available
prerequisite_glossary.react_app: The runtime is a React application (ReactDOM >= 18)
prerequisite_glossary.wallet_connected: PushUniversalWalletProvider has an active session — connectionStatus === CONNECTION.STATUS.CONNECTED
prerequisite_glossary.inside_push_wallet_provider: The component is rendered inside a PushUniversalWalletProvider tree
prerequisite_glossary.smart_contract_deployed: A Solidity contract is deployed to Push Chain Donut Testnet (chainId 42101)
prerequisite_glossary.cea_system_configured: The contract declares UGPC (0x...C1) and UNIVERSAL_EXECUTOR_MODULE (0x14191Ea...) and implements IUniversalGatewayPC
prerequisite_glossary.custom_signing_logic: signAndSendTransaction, signMessage, and signTypedData functions have been implemented

capabilities.name: Initialize Push Chain Client
capabilities.description: Creates a PushChainClient instance with universal signer for cross-chain transaction execution.

inputs.name: signer
inputs.description: Universal signer for full capabilities or account for read-only mode

inputs.name: options.network
inputs.description: Push Chain network to connect to

inputs.name: options.rpcUrls
inputs.description: Custom RPC URLs by chain ID

inputs.name: options.blockExplorers
inputs.description: Custom block explorer URLs by chain ID

inputs.name: options.printTraces
inputs.description: Enable debug trace logging

inputs.name: options.progressHook
inputs.description: Callback for progress events

outputs.name: pushChainClient
outputs.description: Initialized client with universal, orchestrator, and explorer namespaces

capabilities.name: Create Universal Signer
capabilities.description: Wraps any EVM or non-EVM signer into a UniversalSigner for cross-chain transaction signing.

inputs.name: signer
inputs.description: Source signer to convert

outputs.name: universalSigner
outputs.description: Chain-agnostic signer with signMessage, signAndSendTransaction, signTypedData

capabilities.name: Create Universal Signer from Keypair
capabilities.description: Converts a Solana keypair or similar non-EVM keypair to a UniversalSigner.

inputs.name: keypair
inputs.description: Solana keypair or similar

inputs.name: options.chain
inputs.description: Target chain constant

inputs.name: options.library
inputs.description: Library constant (e.g., SOLANA_WEB3JS)

capabilities.name: Send Universal Transaction
capabilities.description: Executes transfers, contract calls, or batched transactions on Push Chain or external chains via a unified interface.

inputs.name: tx.to
inputs.description: Target address or external chain target

inputs.name: tx.from
inputs.description: Use CEA as origin from specified chain

inputs.name: tx.value
inputs.description: Native value in smallest unit (uPC for Push Chain)

inputs.name: tx.data
inputs.description: ABI-encoded calldata or multicall array

inputs.name: tx.funds
inputs.description: Assets to move atomically with execution

inputs.name: tx.progressHook
inputs.description: Callback for transaction lifecycle events

inputs.name: tx.gasLimit
inputs.description: Override estimated gas limit on the target chain

inputs.name: tx.maxFeePerGas
inputs.description: EIP-1559 max fee per gas override (EVM target chains only)

inputs.name: tx.maxPriorityFeePerGas
inputs.description: EIP-1559 max priority fee per gas override (EVM target chains only)

inputs.name: tx.payGasWith
inputs.type: { token?: PAYABLE.TOKEN; slippageBps?: number; minAmountOut?: BigInt | string }
inputs.description: Pay universal gas fees with a supported ERC-20 token instead of native currency

inputs.name: tx.deadline
inputs.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) after which the transaction expires — use for MEV protection and retry logic

capabilities.name: Send Multichain Transaction
capabilities.description: Executes transactions targeting external chains via Chain Executor Accounts (CEAs).

inputs.name: tx.to
inputs.description: External chain target with address and chain constant

inputs.name: tx.data
inputs.description: ABI-encoded calldata

inputs.name: tx.value
inputs.description: Native value for external chain

inputs.name: tx.progressHook
inputs.description: Progress callback

inputs.name: tx.from
inputs.description: Use CEA as origin from specified external chain

inputs.name: tx.funds
inputs.description: Assets to bridge atomically with the external chain execution

inputs.name: tx.gasLimit
inputs.description: Override estimated gas limit on the external target chain

inputs.name: tx.maxFeePerGas
inputs.description: EIP-1559 max fee per gas override

inputs.name: tx.maxPriorityFeePerGas
inputs.description: EIP-1559 max priority fee per gas override

inputs.name: tx.payGasWith
inputs.type: { token?: PAYABLE.TOKEN; slippageBps?: number; minAmountOut?: BigInt | string }
inputs.description: Pay universal gas fees with a supported ERC-20 instead of native currency

inputs.name: tx.deadline
inputs.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) after which the transaction expires

outputs.name: txResponse
outputs.description: Transaction response with external chain execution details

capabilities.name: Contract-Initiated Multichain Execution
capabilities.description: Smart contracts on Push Chain initiate execution on external chains via CEA system using IUniversalGatewayPC.

inputs.name: req.recipient
inputs.description: CEA or target address on the external chain (bytes-encoded)

inputs.name: req.payload
inputs.description: ABI-encoded calldata to execute on the external chain

inputs.name: req.token
inputs.description: PRC20 token to bridge (address(0) for none)

inputs.name: req.amount
inputs.description: Amount of PRC20 to bridge

outputs.name: execution
outputs.description: Emits cross-chain event; response arrives via executeUniversalTx() inbound callback

capabilities.sdk_method: Solidity: IUniversalGatewayPC(0x00000000000000000000000000000000000000C1).sendUniversalTxOutbound(req) / executeUniversalTx(sourceChain, cea, payload, amount, prc20, txId)

capabilities.name: Track Universal Transaction
capabilities.description: Resumes tracking any universal transaction by hash and origin chain. Works independently of sendTransaction — use for session restore, backend polling, or monitoring any stored tx hash.

inputs.name: txHash
inputs.description: Transaction hash or signature on the origin chain

inputs.name: options.chain
inputs.description: Chain where tx was originally submitted. Defaults to CHAIN.PUSH_TESTNET_DONUT

inputs.name: options.progressHook
inputs.description: Callback invoked at each tracking step

inputs.name: options.waitForCompletion
inputs.description: true = wait for confirmation (default); false = return after first status check

inputs.name: options.advanced.pollingIntervalMs
inputs.description: Poll interval in ms (default 2000, min 500)

inputs.name: options.advanced.timeout
inputs.description: Max wait ms before timeout error (default 60000)

inputs.name: options.advanced.rpcUrls
inputs.description: Custom RPC URLs for status queries

outputs.name: response
outputs.description: Same shape as sendTransaction response — latest resolved state including Push Chain and external-chain details

capabilities.name: Sign Universal Message
capabilities.description: Signs arbitrary messages using the universal signer for verification purposes.

inputs.name: message
inputs.description: Message bytes to sign

capabilities.name: Read Blockchain State
capabilities.description: Reads on-chain state from Push Chain using Ethers.js JsonRpcProvider or Viem PublicClient connected to the Push Chain EVM RPC endpoint.

inputs.name: rpcUrl
inputs.description: Push Chain RPC URL (e.g., https://evm.donut.rpc.push.org/)

inputs.name: query
inputs.description: Transaction hash, address, or block tag to query

inputs.name: clientLibrary
inputs.description: EVM client library to use (default: ethers)

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: On-chain data: transaction, block, balance, or contract call result

capabilities.name: Connect Wallet via UI Kit
capabilities.description: Renders wallet connection modal supporting EVM and non-EVM wallets with email fallback.

inputs.name: walletConfig.network
inputs.description: Target network

capabilities.name: Use Push Universal Wallet Provider
capabilities.description: React context provider that abstracts wallet connections and provides pushChainClient.

inputs.name: walletConfig
inputs.description: Network and optional config

capabilities.name: Initialize EVM Client
capabilities.description: Creates ethers.js or viem client connected to Push Chain RPC for direct EVM operations.

inputs.name: rpcUrl
inputs.description: Push Chain RPC URL (e.g., https://evm.donut.rpc.push.org/)

outputs.name: provider
outputs.description: EVM-compatible provider for read-only on-chain queries

capabilities.sdk_method: new ethers.JsonRpcProvider(rpcUrl) | createPublicClient({ chain: pushTestnetDonut, transport: http(rpcUrl) })

capabilities.name: Get Constants Reference
capabilities.description: Access all PushChain.CONSTANTS values for networks, chains, libraries, and tokens.

capabilities.name: Use Utility Functions
capabilities.description: Access helper utilities for parsing units, encoding data, and account operations.

outputs.name: utils
outputs.description: Utility namespace with signer, account, helpers

capabilities.name: Use Contract Helpers
capabilities.description: Access deployed helper contracts for origin chain detection and user categorization.

inputs.name: address
inputs.description: Push Chain address to query (UEA or native EOA)

outputs.name: account
outputs.description: { chainNamespace, chainId, owner } of the origin wallet

outputs.name: isUEA
outputs.description: True if address is a cross-chain Universal Executor Account

capabilities.sdk_method: Solidity: IUEAFactory(0x...eA).getOriginForUEA(addr) | getUEAForOrigin(UniversalAccountId) / Off-chain: ethers.Contract(FACTORY, ABI, provider).getOriginForUEA(address)

capabilities.name: Get Account Status
capabilities.description: Returns UEA deployment status, version info, and upgrade requirements for an account.

inputs.name: options.forceRefresh
inputs.description: Re-fetch status from chain

capabilities.name: Upgrade Universal Account
capabilities.description: Upgrades UEA to latest required implementation version via gasless signature operation.

inputs.name: options.progressHook
inputs.description: Callback for upgrade progress

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Upgrade completes or throws on failure

capabilities.name: Reinitialize Client
capabilities.description: Reinitializes PushChainClient with different signer/account or updated configuration.

inputs.name: signerOrAccount
inputs.description: New signer or account

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Updated configuration options

capabilities.name: Construct Custom Universal Signer
capabilities.description: Manually constructs a UniversalSigner with custom signing function implementations.

inputs.name: account
inputs.description: Account with address and chain

inputs.name: options.signAndSendTransaction
inputs.description: Custom tx signing

inputs.name: options.signMessage
inputs.description: Custom message signing

inputs.name: options.signTypedData
inputs.description: Custom typed data signing

capabilities.name: Use Push Wallet Context Hook
capabilities.description: React hook to access wallet connection status and actions from PushUniversalWalletProvider.

capabilities.name: Use Push Chain Client Hook
capabilities.description: React hook to access the initialized pushChainClient from wallet provider context.

capabilities.name: Execute Transaction Cascade (Multi-Hop)
capabilities.description: Prepares multiple universal transactions then executes them atomically as a single-signature multi-hop cascade. Use prepareTransaction() for each hop, then executeTransactions([...]) for submission. Required for any multi-chain sequence that must be signed once — this is the canonical cascade pattern in both backend and frontend skill files.

inputs.name: txs[].to
inputs.description: Target address or external chain target for each hop

inputs.name: txs[].data
inputs.description: ABI-encoded calldata or multicall array for each hop

inputs.name: txs[].funds
inputs.description: Assets to move atomically with each hop

inputs.name: txs[].progressHook
inputs.description: Per-hop progress callback

capabilities.name: Sign Universal Typed Data (EIP-712)
capabilities.description: Signs EIP-712 typed structured data using the universal signer. Required for Permit2, Uniswap v3/v4, OpenSea Seaport, and any protocol using off-chain typed-data authorizations (gasless approvals, order matching, etc.).

inputs.name: typedDataArgs
inputs.description: EIP-712 typed data: domain, types (Record<string, TypedDataField[]>), and value (Record<string, unknown>)
